overview.title: Overview
overview.tagline: Orchestrate AI agents across every channel.
overview.description: Synapse connects your messaging channels to intelligent agents that understand context, extract intent, and take structured action — with humans in the loop.

modules.title: Modules
modules.description: Each module is an independent domain feature. Activate and configure them per workspace.

messaging.title: Messaging
messaging.description: Connect WhatsApp, Telegram and other channels. Automate conversations and capture leads with AI.
messaging.clinicFlowDesc: WhatsApp → AI scheduling → human validation → calendar. Full audit trail.

clinicFlow.title: ClinicFlow AI
clinicFlow.description: AI-powered scheduling from WhatsApp messages with human validation.

empty.queueDesc: Scheduling requests from WhatsApp will appear here.
empty.errorsDesc: Processing errors will appear here when they occur.

auth.signInDesc: Enter your credentials to access your workspace.
